title: Death Note
description: Mod or datapack allows you to write names in the Death Note!
body:
## How to use
To get a note you need to use this command.

```
/trigger bizcub.deathnote
```
or
```
/function deathnote:deathnote
```
For it to work, you need to open the notebook, write the nickname exactly and click done. Immediately after this, a murder will occur.

## Craft
To craft a Death Note you need 8 ink sacs and a book with a quill. (1.20.5+)

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5c0WluYg/images/60927f8bf9f6c0a914b8d622ea7236d334b7d741.png)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
